description.short: Teams bot for onboarding workflows and status queries.
description.full: BridgePrep Onboarding Agent handles onboarding workflow updates, status lookups, and channel notifications in Microsoft Teams.

commands.title: status
commands.description: Check onboarding status for an employee.

commands.title: stages
commands.description: Show tracker stages for an employee.

commands.title: capacity
commands.description: Check staff-roster capacity for one group.

commands.title: find-tracker
commands.description: Find an employee in the onboarding tracker.

commands.title: find-roster
commands.description: Find an employee in the staff roster.

commands.title: leave
commands.description: Start or end staff-roster leave status.

commands.title: update-field
commands.description: Update a non-stage tracker or roster field.

commands.title: update-stage
commands.description: Mark a tracker stage complete or incomplete.
